title: Interrupted live run dirtied the workspace without matching changed-file artifacts
description: The live runner changed `docs/demos/README.md`, but the interrupted run artifacts still showed no changed files and no runner result bundle, leaving the persisted evidence out of sync with the observed workspace state.
reproductionNotes: Start the demo walkthrough dogfood run with the live runner, interrupt it before completion, then compare the working tree diff with the run directory contents.
suspectedCause: Changed-file capture relies on post-run persistence that never finished after the interrupted runner stage.
